testcases.input: n = 3, paths = [[1,2],[2,3],[3,1]] Output: [1,2,3] Explanation: Gardens 1 and 2 have different types. Gardens 2 and 3 have different types. Gardens 3 and 1 have different types. Hence, [1,2,3] is a valid answer. Other valid answers include [1,2,4], [1,4,2], and [3,2,1].
